name: Asianet News

name: Media One News

name: Karuppu Tamil 2026
description: Karuppu (கருப்பு) is a Tamil action drama film that shows the story of a strong hero who fights against injustice in a village. The film focuses on themes like justice, power, and protecting innocent people.
